mapper.sql:
( A.add_id = #{boardMember.web_id} OR A.add_id = #{boardMember.member_id} ) AND A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.group_depth = 0
AND
(title LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(CONTENT, #{search_text}) > 0)
(DBMS_LOB.INSTR(CONTENT, #{search_text}) > 0)
${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'

( A.user_id = #{boardMember.web_id} OR A.user_id = #{boardMember.member_id} ) AND A.delete_yn = 'N' AND B.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.board_idx = B.board_idx
AND (DBMS_LOB.INSTR(A.COMMENT_CONTENT, #{search_text}) > 0)
AND A.${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD A WHERE

${pagingTop} SELECT ( SELECT H.context_path FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = A.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_18, ( SELECT H.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = A.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_19, ( SELECT M.board_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = A.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_20, ( SELECT MAX(H.menu_idx) FROM CMS_MENU H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = A.manage_idx AND H.manage_idx = M.manage_idx AND H.menu_type = 'BOARD' ) AS imsi_n_1, A.manage_idx, A.board_idx, A.title, A.secret_yn, A.add_date FROM CMS_BOARD A WHERE
ORDER BY board_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT A, CMS_BOARD B WHERE

${pagingTop} SELECT ( SELECT H.context_path FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = B.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_18, ( SELECT H.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = B.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_19, ( SELECT M.board_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = B.manage_idx ) AS imsi_v_20, ( SELECT MAX(H.menu_idx) FROM CMS_MENU H, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE M WHERE H.homepage_id = M.homepage_id AND M.manage_idx = B.manage_idx AND H.manage_idx = M.manage_idx AND H.menu_type = 'BOARD' ) AS imsi_n_1, A.*, B.manage_idx FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT A, CMS_BOARD B WHERE
ORDER BY comment_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}
mapper.sql:
AND a.book_idx = b.book_idx AND ( a.member_id = #{boardMember.web_id} OR a.member_id = #{boardMember.member_id} )
AND a.user_comment LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND b.book_name LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND a.user_comment LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_COMMENT a, ELIB_BOOK b WHERE 1=1

${pagingTop} SELECT a.comment_idx, TO_CHAR(a.regdt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS regdt, a.book_idx, a.member_id, a.user_comment, b.book_name, b.author_name, b.book_pubname, b.type, DECODE(b.type, 'EBK', 14, 'ADO', 19, 'WEB', 27) AS menu_idx FROM ELIB_COMMENT a, ELIB_BOOK b WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY comment_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}
